name: tivibench-video-reasoning-evaluation
description: Benchmark and evaluate video understanding models on think-in-video reasoning tasks, establishing metrics for complex temporal and visual reasoning. Trigger: When building or evaluating video reasoning systems
content:
## TiViBench: Video Reasoning Evaluation

Benchmark and evaluate video understanding models on think-in-video reasoning tasks, establishing metrics for complex temporal and visual reasoning.

### Core Concept

Evaluation framework for video understanding with temporal reasoning

### Key Techniques

This skill focuses on implementing approaches from research in agent reasoning, model optimization, and system scaling.

### Implementation

For implementation details, refer to the source paper at https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.13704

### Practical Guidance

- **When to use**: When building or evaluating video reasoning systems
- **Integration**: Use with other agent skills for comprehensive systems
- **Scaling**: Consider performance trade-offs when applying at scale

### Reference

Paper: TiViBench: Benchmarking Think-in-Video Reasoning for Video Generative Models
arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.13704
